Coff..Chest: Strong, quick palpitation of the heart with extreme nervousness, sleeplessness and cerebral erethism caused by unexpected news of great good fortune.
Coff..Chill: He is extremely sensitive to cold, sensitive to the wind and cold weather. Complaints come on in the cold weather, from the cold air.
Coff..Extremities: Coffea has a painful sensitiveness of the skin beyond comprehension. I remember one particular case. A woman had her lower limb out of bed and it was as red as fire down one side.
Coff..Generalities: This drug is characterized by a general sensitivity. Sensitiveness of vision, of hearing, of smell, of touch; sensitiveness to pain.
Coff..Head: Headache as if the whole brain were torn and bruised, or dashed to pieces. Worse from motion, noise or light.
Coff..Mind: Fainting from sudden emotions. Hysteria, nervousness, weeping. Pitiful weeping from pain trembling and weeping from hurt feelings; the slightest neglect. The greatest mental and physical exhaustion; great restlessness lying awake most of the night.
Coff..Mind, irritability: Pitiful weeping from pain trembling and weeping from hurt feelings; the slightest neglect.
Coff..Mouth: Pain in the mouth and jaws, better from holding ice-cold water in the mouth.
Coff..Rectum: The first effect of Opium is to constipate. Let several doses be given, and as the effects of the Opium wear off he may have diarrhea.
Coff..Sleep: The wakefulness produced by Coffea is well known, even to the laity. It is taken by nurses to keep them awake nights with their patients. The Coffea patient is quick to act and to think. So full of ideas that she lies awake nights making plans, thinking of a thousand things; utterly unable to banish the thoughts that flood the mind.
Coff..Generalities, faintness: Her heart palpitates, her pulse flickers, she has fainting spells, and without Coffea she may die.
Coff..Generalities, pain: Pains are increased by noise. Sensitiveness of hearing is so great that sounds are painful. Pains in the face, toothache, headache; pains in the lower limbs; everywhere aggravated by noise.
Coff..Head, congestion: At times the head is hot, the face is flushed and, the eyes so brilliant that one fears apoplexy.
Coff..Mind, restlessness: The greatest mental and physical exhaustion; great restlessness lying awake most of the night.
Coff..Clinical: Neuralgic toothache entirely relieved by holding cold water in the mouth, returning as it becomes warm. Toothache during the menstrual period. Complaints of anemic children during dentition.
Coff..Abdomen: Worse from every motion, with violent pain in the groins, and fear of death.
Coff..Heart & Circulation: Palpitation of the heart, pulse fluttering. Strong, quick palpitation of the heart with extreme nervousness, sleeplessness and cerebral erethism caused by unexpected news of great good fortune.
Coff..Face: The neuralgia of the face is a common feature of old coffee drinkers.
Coff..Face, heat: Eyes brilliant; pupils dilated; face flushed head hot.
Coff..Generalities, heat, sensation of: Intense stinging, burning pains in the skin with the redness and heat with coarse rash coming on suddenly, leaving just as suddenly.
Coff..Head, pain: Headache as if the whole brain were torn and bruised, or dashed to pieces. Worse from motion, noise or light. Headache intolerable. Head feels small, and as if filled with fluid. Nervous hysterical headache. One-sided headache.
Coff..Sleep, sleeplessness: So full of ideas that she lies awake nights making plans, thinking of a thousand things; utterly unable to banish the thoughts that flood the mind; hears the clocks on the distant steeples.
Coff..Generalities, heat: Hot head; inflamed condition of the gums. The head is hot, the face is flushed.
